MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:WALTER PARSLEY FOR PLAINTIFF JOAN JUNKIN, ALSO PRESENT
DEFENDANT JOSEPH MCLAUGHLIN IN PRO PER

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED ON RECORD. TERMS OF STIPULATED JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION TO PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT TO VACATE PREMISES AT 207 6TH AVENUE ON OR BEFORE 7PM 11/30/04 AND LEAVE IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION. FORFEITURE OF AGREEMENT. BACK RENT $1336, DAILY RENT $757, ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS $1198, FOR A TOTAL OF $3291 OWED. IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES PLAINTIFF WILL WAIVE MONEY OWED AND PAY DEFENDANT $900. PLAINTIFF WILL VACATE JUDGEMENT, AND FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE.

JUDGE PRO TEM: CATHY MOSBRUCKER; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER:RHONDA AQUILINA(218)
